Profile.title: Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your details and fine-tune your connection.
Profile.avatar_invalid_format: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP are supported

validation.display_name_min: Display name must have at least 2 characters.
validation.account_holder_invalid: Account holder must be uppercase without accents.

upgrade.title: Become a Tarot Reader
upgrade.subtitle: Unlock master-level abilities
upgrade.desc: Want to share your Tarot reading skills with the community? Apply to become a Reader — receive questions from seekers and earn Diamond.
upgrade.pending_desc: Your Reader application has been submitted and is awaiting admin review. You will be notified when a decision is made.

mfa.title: Two-factor security
mfa.subtitle: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA/TOTP) protects your account from unauthorized access. Required for payouts.
mfa.enabled_desc: Your account is protected with MFA.
mfa.disabled_desc: Enable MFA to protect your wallet and withdraw.
mfa.step1_desc: Use Google Authenticator, Authy or any TOTP app.
mfa.step2_desc: If you lose your device, you must use these codes to recover. Each code can only be used once.
mfa.step3_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to finish setup.

reader.title: Reader console
reader.subtitle: Manage your public profile and availability.
reader.toast_not_found: Reader profile not found. Have you been approved?
reader.bio_placeholder: Describe your reading style and experience...
reader.price_help: The main question fee is charged via Escrow.
